---
title: Mindfulness and practive in early Buddhism
subtitle: At some point I will add my personal reflection on how early Buddhist practice, Chan and Mahamudra compare. 
image: /images/first-sermon.png
---

![Drawing generated by Gemini, based on a photo of a Water-Moon Bodhisattva at the Fitzwilliam Museum in Cambridge, UK.](/images/bodhisattva-gemini.jpg)
